notes: Executed by the conformance parity runner against the local staged-mutation path with live fixture variables. Shopify returns newly created image media as `UPLOADED` with null `preview.image` / `MediaImage.image` urls in the mutation payload; after Shopify marks the media READY, `Product.images`, `featuredImage`, and `featuredMedia` expose the image/media relationship. The proxy deterministically promotes staged media to READY on downstream product reads and uses local synthetic media, image-source, and product-image IDs plus local media URLs.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a stable local MediaImage GID for the staged session; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The mutation payload product media connection reuses the staged local MediaImage GID generated by productCreateMedia.
The downstream proxy read uses the staged local MediaImage GID generated by productCreateMedia.
The proxy serves a deterministic local media URL while Shopify returns a CDN URL for the processed image.
The proxy derives a local ImageSource GID from its staged MediaImage; Shopify returns the dev-store ImageSource GID.
The proxy serves a deterministic local media URL while Shopify returns a CDN URL for the processed image.
The proxy derives a local ProductImage GID from its staged MediaImage; Shopify returns the dev-store ProductImage GID.
The proxy serves a deterministic local media URL while Shopify returns a CDN URL for the processed product image.
The local connection uses deterministic local cursors while Shopify returns opaque cursors.
The local connection uses deterministic local cursors while Shopify returns opaque cursors.
The proxy derives a local ProductImage GID from its staged MediaImage; Shopify returns the dev-store ProductImage GID.
The proxy serves a deterministic local media URL while Shopify returns a CDN URL for the processed featured image.
The proxy returns its staged local MediaImage GID; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The proxy derives a local ImageSource GID from its staged MediaImage; Shopify returns the dev-store ImageSource GID.
The proxy serves a deterministic local media URL while Shopify returns a CDN URL for the processed featured media image.
The proxy serves a deterministic local media URL while Shopify returns a CDN URL for the processed featured media preview.
